response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON only contained song lyrics for the second half of the video. The spoken dialogue in the first half was transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON for the singing segment (02:07 onwards), matching the vocal phonetics. The first segment's dialogue was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all subtitles tightly to the vocal triggers to handle both conversational pauses and the rapid tempo of 'Gigantic O.T.N', including the extremely fast spoken disclaimer section. Adjusted typos in timestamps to prevent any overlap errors.

subtitles.original: 吾輩は、どうやっていけば良いんだー！
subtitles.english: What on earth should I do?!

subtitles.original: 勝手にTier表とか作っちゃいましたし…
subtitles.english: We went ahead and made a tier list without asking...

subtitles.original: それだ！！！
subtitles.english: That's it!

subtitles.original: ほら、吾輩、お姉さん大好きでしょ？
subtitles.english: Look, I absolutely love big sisters, right?

subtitles.original: ホロライブのお姉さん大集合させよう！
subtitles.english: Let's gather all the big sisters of Hololive!

subtitles.original: お姉さんライブだ！！！
subtitles.english: It's an Onee-san Live!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だよ！当てはある！吾輩に任せとけ！
subtitles.english: It'll be fine! I have someone in mind! Leave it to me!

subtitles.original: それはちゃんとラプラスさんのライブとして成立するんですか？
subtitles.english: Will that actually work as your own live concert, Laplus-san?

subtitles.original: そこは…なんか良い感じにやるんだよ！
subtitles.english: Well... we'll somehow make it work!

subtitles.original: ていうか、吾輩のこと好きなファンならさ、やっぱり、吾輩が好きなことしてるところ、楽しく見てくれるんじゃない？
subtitles.english: I mean, if they're fans who like me, they'll surely enjoy seeing me do what I love, right?

subtitles.original: 限度があるんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: Isn't there a limit to that?

subtitles.original: とにかく、やるって決めたらやるの！いくぞー！！！
subtitles.english: Anyway, once I decide to do it, I do it! Let's go!!!

subtitles.original: ノエルさん！
subtitles.english: Noel-san!

subtitles.original: どうしたの？ラプちゃん？
subtitles.english: What's the matter, Lap-chan?

subtitles.original: 実は、もうすぐ吾輩の生誕ライブがあるんですけど、よかったらノエルさんにも出てほしいなって…
subtitles.english: Actually, my birthday live concert is coming up soon, and I was wondering if you'd like to perform in it, Noel-san...

subtitles.original: えー！ラプちゃん誘ってくれるの！？嬉しい！もちろん、だよ！
subtitles.english: Eh! You're inviting me, Lap-chan?! I'm so happy! Of course I will!

subtitles.original: よーし、団長、歌とダンス頑張っちゃおうかな！先輩として、かっこいいところ見せちゃうよー！！！
subtitles.english: All right, as the Knight Commander, I'll do my best with singing and dancing! As your senior, I'll show you my cool side!!!

subtitles.original: あ、いや…歌は吾輩がやるんで…ね？ほら、これ持って！
subtitles.english: Ah, well... I'll be doing the singing... okay? Here, hold this!

subtitles.original: え、なにになに？どういうこと？これって、うちわ？
subtitles.english: Eh, wait, what? What do you mean? Is this... a fan?

subtitles.original: さて、あとは何を歌うかですね…
subtitles.english: Now, all that's left is deciding what to sing...

subtitles.original: 一曲目はね、きっとノエルさんも喜んでくれるはず！
subtitles.english: For the first song, I'm sure you'll love it, Noel-san!

subtitles.original: え！？団長が！？
subtitles.english: Eh!? Me?!

subtitles.original: 去年からノエルさんの影響からか、吾輩のファン層が広がって、こういう曲が喜んでもらえるかなー！って思って！
subtitles.english: Maybe because of your influence since last year, my fanbase has expanded, so I thought they'd enjoy this kind of song!

subtitles.original: えー！期待しちゃうけど…いいのお！？
subtitles.english: Wow! You're getting my hopes up... Is it really okay?!

subtitles.original: 良いですよー！一曲目盛り上がっていきましょー！
subtitles.english: Yes, of course! Let's get hyped up for the first song!

subtitles.original: きたー！
subtitles.english: It's here!

subtitles.original: 存外見掛け倒しな虚勢張ってるロマンス
subtitles.english: Contrary to popular belief, this romance is all a bluff

subtitles.original: 組み換えちゃって遺伝子オンリーロンリーエマージェンシー
subtitles.english: Recombine those genes, it's a lonely love emergency!

subtitles.original: トゥケトゥケな電波に乗った感情論
subtitles.english: Emotional attachment carried on fuzzy radio waves

subtitles.original: 僕のアッピル見逃さないでよ やだやだ やだやだ
subtitles.english: Don't miss my appeal, no way, no way, no way!

subtitles.original: 人間なんてだれだってこういうのが好きなんですって
subtitles.english: They say every human being likes this kind of thing
